summary: Phase 3.7g Testing Complete - Cookie-Einstellungen nachträglich bearbeitbar, Fehlerregister in Mem0 verified, all features working correctly. 18/18 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Cookie Banner appears on first visit when no w2g_cookie_consent in localStorage
Cookie Banner disappears after accepting and does not reappear on subsequent visits
Footer 'Cookie-Einstellungen' (DE) / 'Cookie Settings' (EN) link is visible with Shield icon
Footer Cookie link opens Cookie Manage Panel correctly
Manage Mode shows current consent status from localStorage (toggle reflects stored state)
Manage Mode has 'Änderungen speichern' / 'Save Changes' button (primary)
Manage Mode has 'Alle akzeptieren' / 'Accept All' button (secondary)
Manage Mode is closable via × button
Manage Mode is closable via backdrop click
Functional toggle in Manage Mode changes cookie selection
Save Changes saves modified selection to localStorage
Privacy Section 9 references Footer link for Cookie Settings ('jederzeit über den Link Cookie-Einstellungen im Seitenfuß angepasst')
No [OFFEN]/[HINWEIS]/Go-Live warnings on /legal page
No [OFFEN]/[HINWEIS]/Go-Live warnings on /agb page
No [OFFEN]/[HINWEIS]/Go-Live warnings on /privacy page
No [OFFEN] warnings on /portal/financials - shows 'Zahlungsmodul in Vorbereitung' message
Cookie Banner is fully bilingual DE/EN (switches with i18n)
Manage Mode is fully bilingual DE/EN
Admin login works (admin@studienkolleg-aachen.de / Admin@2026!) - redirects to /staff
Staff login works (staff@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - redirects to /staff
Teacher login works (teacher@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - redirects to /staff
Applicant login works (applicant@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - redirects to /portal
Notification Bell visible in Staff Layout (top-right corner)
Notification Bell visible in Applicant Layout (top-right corner)
Mobile Header (390px): Logo, DE/EN switcher, Burger menu all visible and correctly spaced
Mobile Menu: Shows Courses, Services, Contact, Sign In, Apply Now links
Desktop Header: Logo, Courses, Services, Contact, DE/EN switcher, Sign In, Apply Now all visible
FEHLERREGISTER.md exists in /app/memory/ with 8 documented lessons learned
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7g complete. Cookie Manage Mode fully functional - openable from footer link, shows current consent status, allows toggling functional cookies, saves changes to localStorage. All legal pages clean of staging warnings. Privacy Section 9 correctly references footer link. FEHLERREGISTER.md in /app/memory/ contains 8 lessons learned. All 4 role logins verified. Notification bell visible in Staff and Applicant layouts. Mobile and Desktop headers working correctly.
